title: Truck Accidents
heading: Injured in a Trucking Accident?
subheading: Find a lawyer who has the resources and experience to fight for your compensation.
metaTitle: Truck Accident Lawyer | Free Consultation | AccidentLogic
metaDescription: Hit by an 18-wheeler or commercial vehicle? Get matched with an attorney who fights for full compensation. Free, no-obligation case evaluation.
tagline: Hit by an 18-Wheeler or Commercial Vehicle? You May Be Eligible for a High-Value Settlement.
description: Collisions with semi-trucks and commercial vehicles are some of the most devastating. These cases involve complex liability — multiple parties like trucking companies, insurers, and logistics providers.

title: Pedestrian Accidents
heading: Were You a Pedestrian Struck by a Car?
subheading: Find a lawyer who has the resources and experience to fight for your compensation.
metaTitle: Pedestrian Accident Lawyer | Free Consultation | AccidentLogic
metaDescription: Struck by a vehicle while walking? Get matched with a pedestrian accident attorney who fights for full compensation. Free case evaluation.
tagline: Struck by a Vehicle While Walking? Know Your Rights as a Pedestrian.
description: Drivers are legally required to yield to pedestrians. But when they don't, the consequences can be life-altering. If you or a loved one were hit while walking, jogging, or crossing the street, we can connect you with a skilled pedestrian accident attorney.

title: Motorcycle Accidents
heading: Injured While Riding?
subheading: Find a lawyer who has the resources and experience to fight for your compensation.
metaTitle: Motorcycle Accident Lawyer | Free Consultation | AccidentLogic
metaDescription: Injured in a motorcycle crash? Connect with an attorney who knows how to fight insurance bias against riders. Free, no-obligation case evaluation.
tagline: Motorcyclist Injuries Are Often Severe. We'll Fight to Get You Full Compensation.
description: Motorcyclists face unique dangers on the road — and often, insurance companies are quick to blame the rider. Don't let that happen to you.

title: Rideshare Accidents
heading: Were You Injured in an Uber or Lyft Accident?
subheading: Find a lawyer who has the resources and experience to fight for your compensation.
metaTitle: Rideshare Accident Lawyer | Uber & Lyft Claims | AccidentLogic
metaDescription: Injured in a rideshare crash? Don't get stuck in insurance limbo. Get matched with an attorney who knows Uber and Lyft claims. Free case evaluation.
tagline: Injured in an Uber or Lyft? Don't Get Stuck in Insurance Limbo.
description: Accidents involving rideshare vehicles are confusing. Was the driver on the clock? Whose insurance applies? What if you're the passenger? We'll connect you with an attorney who knows the rideshare landscape.
